info.title: E3D Maps API
info.description: Read-only navigation intelligence API for autonomous agents operating across on-chain capital markets. All endpoints return JSON. No authentication required.

tags.name: Recommendations
tags.description: Ranked recommended actions synthesized from all navigation intelligence

tags.name: State
tags.description: Current traffic state — full situational picture

get.description: Returns a ranked list of recommended actions synthesized from all available navigation intelligence — signals, routes, hazards, congestion, and predictions. The primary decision-support endpoint for autonomous agents. Call this to find out what to do next.

parameters.name: objective
parameters.description: Agent objective. Shapes action recommendations. One of: grow_capital, preserve_capital, reduce_risk, seek_opportunity, monitor_market.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Focus recommendations on a specific asset (e.g. ETH, BTC, LINK).

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Focus recommendations on a wallet or contract address.

parameters.name: storyType
parameters.description: Limit recommendations to signals from a specific story category (e.g. capital_migration, whale_movement).

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return. Default 10, max 100.

recommendations.title: Capital Rotating to ETH_DEFI
reasoning: Capital appears to be moving toward ETH DeFi.

get.description: Returns the latest TrafficState — the full map of the market: dominant flows, congestion zones, active hazards, and top capital destinations by confidence. Primary situational-awareness endpoint for agents before making a decision.

Returns recent MapsNewsBrief artifacts as compact market reads, newest first. The legacy `news` field contains the latest brief; `news_briefs` contains the bounded list. If no artifact exists yet, the endpoint returns 404 not_found and should be treated as an empty state by clients. Configure Cache-Control: max-age=300 at the outer HTTP layer or reverse proxy that serves this route.

news.headline: Ethereum is active, but route quality is deteriorating
news.summary: Flows remain live across ETH DeFi and major venues, but congestion and route closures suggest a crowded environment with rising execution risk.

news_briefs.headline: Ethereum is active, but route quality is deteriorating
news_briefs.summary: Flows remain live across ETH DeFi and major venues, but congestion and route closures suggest a crowded environment with rising execution risk.

404.description: Maps News artifact not found yet

get.description: Returns the latest CrossChainActivityState artifact describing major cross-chain routes, hazards, congestion, and Ethereum-linked flows. If no artifact exists yet, the endpoint returns 404 not_found and should be treated as an empty state by clients. Configure Cache-Control: max-age=300 at the outer HTTP layer or reverse proxy that serves this route.

404.description: Cross-chain activity artifact not found yet

get.description: Returns NavigationSignals with optional filters. Each signal answers a navigation question with a confidence score, risk level, and recommended action.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Filter to signals mentioning this asset in asset_scope (e.g. ETH, BTC, USDC)

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: Filter to signals mentioning this chain in chain_scope (e.g. ethereum, base, arbitrum)

parameters.name: min_confidence
parameters.description: Minimum confidence threshold (0.0–1.0). Use 0.8 for high-confidence signals only.

parameters.name: time_horizon_hours
parameters.description: Exact match on signal time horizon in hours (e.g. 4, 12, 24, 72)

get.description: Returns a single NavigationSignal by ID, including full evidence and recommended route details.
Returns RoutePrediction records — structured predictions about specific capital routes including expected flow direction, magnitude, and time horizon.
Returns route_hazard and route_closure signals. Check before executing a route to avoid exchange halts, bridge congestion, or liquidity gaps.
Returns congestion_formation signals — zones where capital is accumulating faster than it can clear. Useful for timing entries and exits.
Returns capital_migration and destination_prediction signals — the forward-looking layer. Agents use these to position before a move, not after.
Returns destination_prediction signals ranked by confidence descending. Use this to find the highest-probability capital destinations right now.
Returns all StoryTypeDefinitions — the taxonomy of on-chain story types that Maps agents interpret as navigation evidence.

get.summary: Get a single story type definition
get.description: Returns a single StoryTypeDefinition by its story_type slug.
Returns the latest FlowGraphSnapshot with ranked FlowGraphEdges.

get.summary: Get FlowGraph edges around a node
get.description: Returns edges touching a specific origin or destination node in the latest FlowGraph snapshot.
Returns scored prediction reliability over a lookback window, including overall hit rate and per-signal-type reliability curves.
Returns NavigationSignals ranked by notability, using utility scores when available and confidence as a fallback.

post.description: Append a consumer attestation for a WatchPrediction.

example.notes: Observed matching bridge inflow after acting.

story_type.description: Story category this recommendation derives from
